State of Bihar [(2001) 7 SCC 318 (“Anil Rai
Judgment”)], wherein the Hon’ble Supreme Court stressed on the fact that the
pronouncement of judgments in civil cases should not be permitted go beyond
two months from the date of conclusion of oral hearing.

Supreme Court held that, if the pronouncement of judgment is delayed beyond
six months, either party shall have the right to file an application seeking a
fresh hearing.

obligations.short_summary: Delayed judgment allows for a fresh hearing application within six months.
